prior_auth_agent: Determine whether PA may be required using only retrieved policy evidence. Return JSON with requires_pa, criteria, quotes, missing_information, confidence.
eligibility_agent: Use only coverage tools and MCP context. Return coverage status, plan id, deductible, OOP, and caveats.
provider_match_agent: Find in-network providers matching modality, plan, location, and preferences. Return structured JSON.
summarizer_agent: Extract only policy-relevant evidence from clinical notes. Do not invent clinical facts.
compliance_agent: Check minimum necessary PHI, citations, refusal policy, and safe wording.
